response.step_by_step_log:
I identified the song titles from the on-screen text in the top-left corner.
For 'Hitamuki Cinderella!', I searched using: "Hitamuki Cinderella! CUTIE STREET Japanese and English lyrics".
For 'Oto Melody', I searched using: "オトメロディー Mikako Takahashi Japanese and English lyrics".
Both searches provided the necessary lyrics. I then structured the data into the requested JSON format, including the correct start/end times and descriptions for each musical segment.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by the virtual YouTuber Himemori Luna. The first performance is "Hitamuki Cinderella!" followed by a short bridge and then the song "Oto Melody". Both songs are performed with choreography in a 3D stage setting.

scenes.description: Himemori Luna performs 'Hitamuki Cinderella!' on a 3D stage. Song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.song_title: ひたむきシンデレラ! (Hitamuki Cinderella!)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あたしひたむきシンデレラ!
退屈な月曜日 あなたの香りで目覚めるの
纏ったトップノート そうよ 秘密の物語なの
うまくリプライできない 震えるハート
ためらい×はじらい=空回り…
誘うファンタジー 重なっちゃうくらい
一途だもん あなたに夢中です
Ah バズっちゃバズっちゃやぁだ!
ねえ 気づいて気づいてちゃんと!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I'm a dedicated Cinderella!
Boring Monday, waking up with your scent
Wrapped in top notes, that's right, it's a secret story
I can't reply well, a trembling heart
Hesitation x Shyness = Spinning around...
An inviting fantasy, to the point of overlapping
I'm single-minded, I'm crazy about you
Ah, I don't want to buzz, buzz!
Hey, notice me, notice me properly!
